title: LLMInvokeResponse
description: Typed broker-local model invoke response carrying canonical digest linkage and one LLMResponse object.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for broker-local LLM invoke response wrappers.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this broker-local LLM invoke response wrapper.

run_id.description: Run identifier whose trusted policy context governed this model invocation.

request_digest.description: Canonical digest for the LLMRequest object this response resolves.

response.description: Canonical typed LLMResponse object returned by broker-mediated model invocation.
